scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute circuit-breaker-online-db --local --file=drizzle/0000_initial_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute circuit-breaker-online-db --local --file=drizzle/seed-from-prod.sql
scripts.db:pull: wrangler d1 export circuit-breaker-online-db --remote --output=drizzle/seed-products.sql --table=products && wrangler d1 export circuit-breaker-online-db --remote --output=drizzle/seed-categories.sql --table=categories && cat drizzle/seed-categories.sql drizzle/seed-products.sql > drizzle/seed-from-prod.sql && rm drizzle/seed-categories.sql drizzle/seed-products.sql
scripts.quality: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
